tier_1_full: Entity Overlap Boost (Layer 4.525) — core retrieval precision, 5/7 MRR failures
Query Term Extraction — stop word pollution affects all downstream matching
tier_2_standard: Graduated Boost Calibration — tuning constants, but 4x cliff is structural

corrected_root_causes.note: User's original analysis had 3 errors corrected during evaluation

corrections.user_claim: Entity boost needs 2 matches, only 'project' matches
corrections.actual: ZERO entity matches. Memory[1] entities=['team','roles','nexus']. None contain 'project' or 'lead'.

corrections.query: What bugs did we find during the debugging phase?
corrections.actual: Morphological mismatch: 'bug'.contains('bugs')=false. Entity is shorter than query term.
Tags are actually ['risks','planning','crdt']. 'risks' matches 'risks' exactly -> overlap=1.

morphological_mismatch.description: entity.contains(query_term) fails when entity is shorter than query term (bugs!=bug)

weak_1_match_boost.description: +0.05 for 1 match is insufficient to flip rankings. 4x cliff to +0.20 for 2 matches.

zero_entity_overlap.description: Memory[1] tags don't contain 'project' or 'lead'. Entity boost is inert.
zero_entity_overlap.fix: Benchmark tagging fix or BM25-layer improvement

conceptual_mapping_gap.description: No session-to-meeting mapping. 'second meeting' cannot resolve to session 2.
conceptual_mapping_gap.fix: Out of scope for entity boost layer

fmea.failure_mode: Zero overlap for semantically correct memory
Stop words matching entity substrings (production risk)

companion_fixes_required: Stemming on both query terms and entity names (rust_stemmers Porter)
Stop word filtering on query terms AFTER stemming

changes: Replace query_terms construction with stemmed+stop-word-filtered pipeline
Change guard from query_terms.len() >= 2 to query_stems.len() >= 1
Replace graduated cliff (0.05/0.10*n) with linear (0.10 * overlap)
Change matching from substring to stem-equality OR stem-substring

key_design_decisions.stem_then_filter: Stem first, then filter stop words. 'using'->stem->'use'->filtered.
key_design_decisions.guard_threshold: >=1 not >=2. After stop word removal, single meaningful terms should still trigger.
key_design_decisions.linear_boost: 0.10 per match. No cliff. Each additional match adds equal incremental value.
key_design_decisions.match_semantics: es == qs || es.contains(qs). Exact stem match OR substring for compounds.

overwatch_findings: Q1 failure is a tagging gap, not an entity boost problem. Memory[1] content says 'project lead' but tags don't include it.
Decision type boost (Layer 4.52) interacts positively with entity boost for decision queries.
Specificity penalty (Layer 4.53) can erase up to 30% of entity boost for long memories.
BM25 already indexes tags and entities separately — entity boost is a tiebreaker signal, not primary.
overloop_refinements: Pass 1: Increased recommended boost from 0.08 to 0.10 per match after adversarial testing showed no regressions on passing queries.
Pass 1: Confirmed stem-then-filter-stop-words ordering is correct ('using'->'use'->filtered).
Pass 2: Verified no regressions on 5 currently-passing queries by tracing entity overlap counts under proposed changes.
Pass 2: Confirmed Q1 is a legitimate hard query — entity boost cannot fix it without benchmark changes.
